session.user: Run this command and report ALL output: ``` uv run pytest packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_checkout_cmd.py -v 2>&1 | head -60 ``` Report every line of the output.
session.assistant: I'll run that command and report all the output.

tool_use.param: Run pytest on checkout command tests with verbose output

pytest failed: Import error while collecting tests
